dalio.philosophy: All Weather 戦略 — A diversified ポートフォリオ designed to survive any economic environment. The key is to cover all four シナリオ: growth, 景気後退, インフレ, and デフレ.
dalio.strategy: 30% 株式 + 40% Long 債券 + 15% Medium 債券 + 7.5% Gold + 7.5% Commodities. By mixing 資産 with low 相関, 損失 are minimized in any environment.
dalio.key_principle: "Pain + Reflection = Progress" — Learn from 損失 and establish principles. True success comes from a correct decision-making system.
dalio.track: +9.5% リターン during the 2008 financial 危機. $150B in 資産 under management, average 12% annual リターン over 30 years. The highest total リターン of any ヘッジ fund in history.

buffett.full_name: ウォーレン・バフェット
buffett.philosophy: Value 投資 — A long-term compounding 戦略 of buying below intrinsic value and holding for the long term. "If you aren't willing to own a 株式 for 10 years, don't even think about owning it for 10 minutes."
buffett.strategy: Concentrated 投資 in quality companies (AAPL, OXY, BRK, etc.). Always maintain 25% cash. The "Circle of Competence" principle of never 投資 in businesses you don't understand.
buffett.key_principle: "Be fearful when others are greedy, and greedy when others are fearful." Contrarian 投資 that turns 市場 fear into opportunity.
buffett.track: +19.8% average annual リターン over the past 58 years. $10,000 invested in 1964 is now worth $140 million. 3x excess リターン vs. S&P 500.

cathie_wood.philosophy: Disruptive Innovation 投資 — Focused on technologies that will change the world in 5 years: AI, blockchain, genomics, space, and more. Short-term ボラティリティ is the price of innovation.
cathie_wood.strategy: Concentrated growth 株式 (TSLA, COIN, ROKU, PATH, etc.). Minimize 分散投資; increase position size as conviction grows. Long-term holding principle of 5+ years.
cathie_wood.key_principle: "Innovation doesn't grow linearly, it grows exponentially." Today's expensive 株式 can become tomorrow's bargain.
cathie_wood.track: ARK Innovation ETF 2020年+152%。長期的なAI楽観論、ビットコイン目標価格150万ドル。

druckenmiller.full_name: Stanley ドラッケンミラー
druckenmiller.philosophy: マクロトレンド＋集中投資 — マクロ経済の流れを読み、確信度が高い時に一方向に大きく賭ける。「正しい判断に消極的に賭けることは無意味だ。」
druckenmiller.strategy: Top-down macro: 分析する interest rates, currencies, fiscal policy → identify high-probability asymmetric opportunities → leveraged concentrated bets. Cut 損失 immediately if wrong; add more if right.
druckenmiller.key_principle: "The key is not how often you are right or wrong, but how much you make when you are right." The asymmetry of リターン is more important than win rate.
druckenmiller.track: 30 consecutive years of average +30% リターン, never a negative year. Over $1B 利益 from shorting the British pound with Soros in 1992. $12B in 資産 when Duquesne closed.

kostolany.guide_intro: André コストラニー (1906-1999) was a legendary European 投資家 who explained the relationship between 金利s and the stock 市場 using an

kostolany.guide_bull_steps: A1 調整 (Buy) → A2 Momentum (Hold) → A3 Overheat (Sell signal)
kostolany.guide_bear_desc: 金利 上昇 → 株式 下落

help.title: ヘルプ
help.faq_a1: baln is an 投資 education app where you build your own 投資 principles by reading daily 5-minute 市場 context, participating in 予測, and reviewing outcomes. It is not a 取引 app.
help.faq_q2: What is the コンテキストカード?
help.faq_a2: The Context Card helps you understand why your 資産 moved today through 4-layer 分析 (historical context, macro chain, institutional behavior, ポートフォリオ impact) in 5 minutes. It auto-updates every 3 hours.
help.faq_q3: How do I participate in the 予測 game?
help.faq_a3: Vote YES/NO on 3 daily 市場 予測 questions. Review results and explanations the next day. Earn 3 どんぐり for correct 予測.
help.faq_q4: How do I use どんぐり?
help.faq_a4: 1 acorn = ₩100. Earn for free via check-in (2 acorns), correct 予測 (3 acorns), sharing (5 acorns). Spend in the 市場place for extra AI 分析 (1 acorn), プレミアム trial (5 acorns), etc.
help.faq_q5: AIヘルスチェックはどのように機能しますか？
help.faq_a5: AI analyzes 7 factors including 分散投資, ボラティリティ, and concentration, rating your ポートフォリオ from A+ to F. It also provides a 処方箋 with specific improvement steps.
help.faq_a6: AI analyzes the philosophy of world-class 投資家s like ウォーレン・バフェット, レイ・ダリオ, キャシー・ウッド, and Stanley ドラッケンミラー, and provides 毎日 insights applied to 今日's 市場.
help.faq_a7: We operate on a Zero-Knowledge principle. We do not collect brokerage passwords or アカウント numbers. All data is encrypted with TLS 1.3 + AES-256.
help.faq_q8: What are the benefits of a プレミアム サブスクリプション?
help.faq_a8: Full 4-layer コンテキストカード 分析, 予測 explanations + review, 3 AI diagnoses/day, institutional behavior 分析, full peer 比較, and 30 acorns 毎月 bonus. ₩4,900/month.

terms.s1_body: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the ポートフォリオ management and 投資 education service ("Service") provided by Baln Inc. ("Company"). By using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
terms.s2_body:
The Service includes:
1. ポートフォリオ tracking and visualization
2. AI-based 資産 分析
3. Context Cards — daily 市場 context explained through 4 lenses (historical, macro, institutional, ポートフォリオ)
4. 予測 Game — AI-generated 市場 quizzes and review
5. Real-time 市場 news feed and ポートフォリオ impact 分析
6. リバランス suggestions and シミュレーション
7. どんぐり-based AI プレミアム features
8. Other ポートフォリオ-related services
terms.s3_title: 3. Disclaimer & 投資 リスク Disclosure
terms.s3_warning: ⚠️ リスク Warning: You may lose some or all of your invested principal.
terms.s3_body:
1. The Service is an educational tool and does not constitute 投資 advice, a solicitation, or an offer to buy or sell any security or financial instrument. The Company is not a registered 投資 adviser.

2. All content provided by the Service (AI 分析, リバランス suggestions, tax calculations, 株式 分析, etc.) is for general informational and educational purposes only. You are solely responsible for your 投資 decisions.

3. The Company is not liable for any direct or indirect 投資 損失 arising from use of the Service.

4. AI 分析 results are based on historical data and statistical models. Past パフォーマンス does not guarantee future results. Actual outcomes may differ materially from 分析.

5. The Service is not insured or guaranteed by any government deposit protection scheme. Principal is not guaranteed.

6. Any tax-related information is provided for reference purposes only. Please consult a qualified tax professional for advice specific to your situation. Tax laws may change without notice.
terms.s4_body: The Company protects your personal information in accordance with applicable law. Please review our Privacy Policy for 詳細s on how we collect, use, and protect your information.
terms.s5_body:
以下に該当する場合、サービスへのアクセスが一時停止または終了される場合があります：
1. 他人になりすます、または他のユーザーの認証情報を悪用する
2. サービスの運営を妨害する
3. 適用法令に違反する
4. 当社が定めるその他の規則に違反する
terms.s6_body:
1. The VIP ラウンジ gathering feature is a peer-matching platform for voluntary meetups. The Company is not the organizer of any gathering.

2. The Company is not responsible for any accident, dispute, or 損失 arising from gatherings facilitated through the Service.

3. All リスク and responsibilities relating to participation in gatherings rest solely with the participants.

4. A 10% platform fee applies to paid gathering registrations and will be disclosed at checkout.

5. Cancellation and refund policies for individual gatherings are determined by the gathering host.
terms.s7_body_intro: サービスを以下の目的で使用してはなりません：
terms.s7_item_a_desc: : direct unspecified individuals to buy or sell specific securities, or engage in unregistered 投資 advisory activities.
terms.s7_item_b_desc: : use expressions such as "guaranteed principal", "fixed リターン of X%", or "100% 利益".
terms.s7_item_c_desc: ：外部メッセージアプリ（KakaoTalk、Telegramなど）へ誘導し、投資勧誘や金銭要求を行うこと。
terms.s7_item_d_desc: : accept compensation for 投資 recommendations without proper regulatory registration.
terms.s7_penalty_bold: immediate permanent アカウント suspension
terms.s7_penalty_suffix: が科され、関係当局への通報が行われる場合があります。
terms.s8_body:
1. どんぐり are in-app points used to access AI プレミアム features. 1 どんぐり ≈ $0.08 USD in value.

2. Purchased どんぐり may be refunded within 7 days of purchase, provided they have not been used.

3. Used (deducted) どんぐり are non-refundable.

4. サブスクリプション bonus どんぐり and promotional どんぐり are non-refundable.

5. If a technical error prevents delivery of an AI 分析, any deducted どんぐり will be automatically restored.

6. どんぐり expire 1 year after the last earn date. You will be notified 30 days before expiration.

7. どんぐり cannot be exchanged for cash, gift cards, or any other form of payment, and cannot be transferred to another user.

8. Refund requests: baln.logic@gmail.com or via in-app support.
terms.s9_body:
1. You must be at least 14 years old (or the minimum age required by the laws of your jurisdiction) to use this Service.

2. If the Company discovers that a user is under the minimum age, the アカウント will be suspended and relevant data deleted.
terms.s10_body:
1. The Company uses AI to automatically 分析する ポートフォリオ data (リスク assessment, リバランス suggestions, etc.).

2. You may opt out of automated AI 分析 by disabling the feature in 設定.

3. AI 分析 does not automatically execute 投資 transactions. All final 投資 decisions are made by you.

4. Your アカウント may be assigned a tier classification based on activity and ポートフォリオ data, which may affect access to certain features.
terms.footer:

privacy.screen_title: プライバシーポリシー
privacy.banner_subtitle: あなたの秘密を私たちは見ません
privacy.policy_zero_knowledge_desc: We do not collect or store your actual 資産 holdings, 取引 passwords, or brokerage login credentials. The app analyzes screenshot images only, and original images are deleted immediately after processing.
privacy.policy_encryption_desc: すべてのデータはTLS 1.3で暗号化して送信され、AES-256暗号化で保存されます。暗号化キーはお客様のデバイスでのみ生成・管理されます。
privacy.policy_local_title: ローカルファースト処理
privacy.policy_local_desc: All calculations and 分析 are performed on-device wherever possible. Only anonymized data is sent to our servers when AI 分析 is required.
privacy.policy_anon_desc: Data sent for AI 分析 has all personally identifiable information removed. Only ticker symbols and quantities are used — no アカウント numbers or real names are ever transmitted.
privacy.policy_delete_title: データ 削除 権利
privacy.policy_delete_desc: You can delete all your data at any time. Go to 設定 > Security > Delete アカウント to permanently erase all data. Deleted data cannot be recovered.
privacy.policy_no_share_desc: お客様のデータは広告、マーケティング、その他の第三者目的で販売・共有されることはありません。法的要求があっても暗号化データのみが存在するため、意味のある開示は不可能です。
privacy.data_item_email_purpose: アカウント作成・ログイン
privacy.data_item_portfolio_retention: ユーザー 削除 可能
privacy.data_item_payment_retention: 決済代行業者が保管（5年間）
privacy.data_item_community_retention: ユーザー 削除 可能
privacy.purpose_body:
We process personal data for the following purposes. Data will not be used for any purpose beyond those listed below. If the purpose changes, we will obtain separate consent as required under applicable data protection law (including GDPR and CCPA).

1. アカウント registration & management: verifying intent to register, identifying and authenticating users, maintaining membership, preventing service misuse
2. Service delivery: ポートフォリオ management, AI-powered 資産 分析, リバランス recommendations, context card delivery, 予測 game operation
3. Marketing & analytics: providing event information and promotional content (with consent), analyzing usage statistics and access frequency
4. Customer support: verifying the identity of complainants, investigating inquiries, communicating findings, and notifying outcomes
privacy.ai_decision_section_title: AI自動意思決定とプロファイリング
privacy.ai_decision_body:
We perform automated AI 分析 (リスク assessment, リバランス suggestions, tax calculations, グル insights, etc.) based on your ポートフォリオ data.

Under applicable data protection law (including GDPR Article 22), you have the right to request an explanation of, or to object to, any fully automated decision-making.

• Opt out of AI 分析: 設定 > Security > Disable AI Auto-分析
• Request an explanation: contact baln.logic@gmail.com

AI 分析 never executes 投資 decisions automatically — all final decisions remain entirely yours.
privacy.cross_border_supabase_purpose:
データベース
ホスティング
privacy.cross_border_detail:
■ Data sent to Google Gemini AI:
• ポートフォリオ ticker symbols and weights (e.g., AAPL 30%)
• 市場 data (prices, exchange rates, indices)
• ヘルススコア and リスク factors

■ Data never sent:
• Name, email, アカウント numbers, or other personally identifiable information
• Actual holdings amounts or transaction history

■ Safeguards:
• All data is transmitted with TLS 1.3 encryption
• Google Gemini API does not use your data to train its models (Google Cloud API Terms of Service)
• You can withdraw consent for AI data sharing in 設定 at any time

All sub-processors hold GDPR compliance certifications and SOC 2 Type II attestation.
privacy.rights_section_title: あなたのデータに関する権利
privacy.rights_body:
Under applicable data protection law (including GDPR and CCPA), you have the following rights:

1. Right to access your personal data
2. Right to correct or delete your personal data
3. Right to restrict processing
4. Right to object to automated decision-making

How to exercise your rights:
• In-app: 設定 > Security > Delete アカウント (processed immediately)
• Email: privacy@baln.app (within 10 business days)
• Mail: Contact our Data Protection Officer at the address below
privacy.dpo_intro: In accordance with applicable data protection regulations, we have designated a Data Protection Officer (DPO) responsible for overseeing personal data 処理中 and handling data subject complaints and remediation.
privacy.dpo_name: ・氏名：全知赫 代表取締役
privacy.dpo_position: ・役職：データ保護責任者（DPO / CPO）
privacy.deletion_body: 個人データが不要になった場合、すなわち保持期間の満了または処理目的の達成後、遅滞なく削除します。
privacy.deletion_procedure_body: 登録時に入力された情報は、目的達成後に別のデータベースに移され、内部方針または適用法で要求される期間保持された後、永久に削除されます。別のデータベース内のデータは、法律で定められた目的以外には使用されません。
privacy.deletion_method_body:
• Electronic files: deleted using technical methods that prevent restoration; database records are destroyed in a non-recoverable manner (logical deletion followed by physical overwrite).
  • Paper documents: shredded or incinerated.
  • AI 分析 logs: automatically and permanently deleted 30 days after creation.
  • Backup data: purged from backup copies within 30 days of deleting the original.
privacy.deletion_legal_heading: 3. 法律で要求される保持
privacy.deletion_legal_body:
・契約または申込撤回に関する記録：5年間（電子商取引法）
  ・代金決済および商品供給に関する記録：5年間（電子商取引法）
  ・消費者の苦情または紛争解決に関する記録：3年間（電子商取引法）
  ・通信確認記録：12ヶ月間（通信秘密保護法）
  ・ログイン記録：3ヶ月間（通信秘密保護法）
privacy.security_intro: 適用法に基づき、個人データを保護するため以下の技術的・管理的・物理的安全措置を実施しています。
privacy.security_admin_body:
・内部データ管理計画の策定と実施
  ・個人データにアクセスする人員の最小化と定期的な研修
  ・定期的な内部セキュリティ監査
privacy.security_tech_body:
• Encryption: all data transmitted via TLS 1.3 and stored with AES-256 encryption
  • Anti-hacking measures: intrusion detection systems, security software installation and updates
  • Access control: management of access privileges to data 処理中 systems and retention of access logs
  • Access log retention and tamper prevention: access logs kept for at least 1 year
privacy.security_physical_body: ・クラウドベースのサービスとして、物理サーバーはSupabase Inc.（AWSインフラ）が管理し、SOC 2 Type II認証基準を満たしています。
privacy.auto_collect_intro: パーソナライズされたサービスを提供するため、利用情報を保存・取得する技術を使用する場合があります。
privacy.auto_collect_items_heading: 1. 自動収集されるデータ
privacy.auto_collect_items_body:
・アプリ利用統計（画面閲覧数、機能使用頻度）
  ・デバイス情報（OSバージョン、アプリバージョン）
  ・認証トークン（ログイン状態の維持）
privacy.auto_collect_purpose_body:
• Service usage 分析 and improvement
  • Personalized service delivery
  • Maintaining login state
privacy.auto_collect_opt_out_body:
• You can clear app data in your device 設定 or reinstall the app to reset automatically collected information.
  • Note: opting out of automatic data collection may limit certain features such as staying logged in.
privacy.dispute_line1: データ保護に関する権利が侵害されたと思われる場合、お住まいの地域のデータ保護当局に苦情を申し立てる権利があります。
privacy.dispute_line2: EU/EEAのユーザー：各国のデータ保護監督機関（例：アイルランドDPC dataprotection.ie）にお問い合わせください。
privacy.dispute_line3: カリフォルニア州居住者（CCPA）：カリフォルニアプライバシー保護局（oag.ca.gov/privacy）にお問い合わせください。
privacy.dispute_line4: 正式な苦情を申し立てる前に、privacy@baln.appまで直接ご連絡いただくことも可能です。
privacy.changes_section_title: プライバシーポリシーの変更
privacy.changes_body:
1. This Privacy Policy is effective as of February 21, 2026.

2. Previous versions of this Privacy Policy:
  • This is the initial version; no prior versions exist.

3. If this Privacy Policy is 更新済み, we will notify you via in-app notice at least 7 days before the changes take effect. For material changes affecting your rights, we will provide at least 30 days' notice.

drift.summary: Measures how far each 資産's weight has drifted from your original purchase or target 配分.
drift.when_high:
Each 資産 is within 5% of its target weight.
Your ポートフォリオ is running as originally planned.
drift.when_low:
You haven't set target weights yet, or certain 資産 have moved significantly.
⚠️ Score is 0 if no target 配分 is set.
drift.formula:
Sum of |actual weight − target weight| for each 資産 ÷ 2
→ 100 pts if drift is 0%, 0 pts if drift ≥ 25%
drift.data_source: Your manually entered 資産 prices + target weights (%) you've set per 資産
drift.tip: Enter target weights (%) in the 分析 tab detail view to raise this score.

concentration.summary: Measures whether リスク is spread across 資産 rather than concentrated in any single one.
concentration.when_high:
No single 資産 アカウント for more than 40% of total リスク.
Even if one 資産 crashes, the overall damage is limited.
concentration.when_low:
One 資産 is carrying more than half your total ポートフォリオ リスク.
If that 資産 drops 30%, your entire ポートフォリオ is significantly impacted.
concentration.formula:
HHI concentration 指数 of each 資産's リスク contribution (value × ボラティリティ)
→ 100 pts when evenly spread, 0 pts when fully concentrated
concentration.data_source:
Your entered 資産 prices + standard ボラティリティ by 資産 type
(e.g. Korean 株式 30%, 仮想通貨 80%, 債券 5%)
concentration.tip: Trim the largest position and add 債券, cash, or other 資産 classes.

correlation.summary: Measures whether your 資産 move in different directions. The more independently they move, the better the 分散投資.
correlation.when_high:
資産 move independently — like 債券 rising when 株式 fall.
Some 資産 act as a buffer when markets turn.
correlation.when_low:
All your 資産 move in the same direction.
Holding only 株式, 仮想通貨, and growth names means everything rises and falls together.
correlation.formula:
Weighted average of historical correlations between 資産 types by weight
→ 100 pts if avg 相関 ≤ −0.3, 0 pts if ≥ 0.8
correlation.data_source:
Historical 相関 coefficients by 資産-type pair (built-in reference values)
Examples: 株式↔債券 −0.1, 株式↔仮想通貨 +0.5, 株式↔Gold +0.1
correlation.tip: Add 資産 that tend to move opposite to 株式 — 債券, gold, or cash.

volatility.summary: Measures how much your total ポートフォリオ value fluctuates.
volatility.when_high:
Annual price swings are under 18%.
Your ポートフォリオ holds relatively stable even during 市場 turbulence.
volatility.when_low:
Annual price swings exceed 30%.
High 仮想通貨 or growth 株式 エクスポージャー creates psychological pressure and パニック-sell リスク.
volatility.formula:
Weighted average of annual ボラティリティ per 資産 type × holding weight
→ 100 pts if < 18%, 0 pts if ≥ 30%
volatility.data_source:
Standard annual ボラティリティ by 資産 type (built-in reference values)
Examples: Korean 株式 30% / 債券 5% / 仮想通貨 80% / cash 0%
volatility.tip: Reduce 仮想通貨 or individual growth 株式 エクスポージャー; increase 債券 ETF and cash to lower swings.

downside.summary: Measures how many of your 資産 are currently at a 損失.
downside.when_high:
Few or no 資産 are at a 損失.
Most of your ポートフォリオ is at or above your cost basis.
downside.when_low:
A significant portion of your ポートフォリオ is sitting at a 損失.
Further declines can compound 損失.
downside.formula:
Weighted average of (cost basis − current price) ÷ cost basis × holding weight for losing 資産
→ 100 pts if no 損失, 0 pts if weighted 損失 ≥ 33%
downside.data_source: Your manually entered cost basis (purchase price) + current 資産 value
downside.tip: For a long-term 戦略, consider averaging down. For shorter-term, set a clear stop-損失 level.

tax.summary: Measures how well you're utilizing tax-損失 harvesting opportunities.
tax.when_high:
No 資産 are down more than 5%, or you've already harvested 損失.
Your tax efficiency is optimized.
tax.when_low:
Several 資産 are down more than 5%.
Selling them before year-end can offset gains elsewhere and reduce your tax bill.
tax.formula:
Number of 資産 down ≥ 5% ÷ total liquid 資産
→ 100 pts if no harvesting opportunities, 0 pts if more than half qualify
tax.data_source: Your manually entered cost basis + current 資産 value
tax.tip: Sell losing 資産 then immediately buy similar ones — you keep your position while capturing the tax benefit.

leverage.summary: Measures whether debt or レバレッジ is being used at a safe level.
leverage.when_high:
No debt, or LTV is below 60% on stable 資産 (e.g. real estate).
No forced liquidation リスク even if values decline.
leverage.when_low:
You're using レバレッジ on high-ボラティリティ 資産 (仮想通貨, growth 株式).
A sharp drop could trigger forced liquidation (margin call).
leverage.formula:
LTV × 資産 ボラティリティ × 資産 value, summed across holdings ÷ total ポートフォリオ
→ 100 pts if リスク metric < 10%, approaches 0 as it rises
leverage.data_source: Your entered loan-to-value ratio + 資産 price + standard ボラティリティ per 資産 type
leverage.tip: Only use レバレッジ on stable 資産 like real estate. Leveraged volatile 資産 carry extreme リスク.

large_cap.title: 📈 株式 (Large Cap)
large_cap.role: The growth engine of your ポートフォリオ. Participates in corporate earnings — a productive 資産.
large_cap.dalio: ダリオ: "Strongest in growth + stable インフレ environments. But can drop 50%+ in 景気後退 — 分散投資 is essential."
large_cap.buffett: バフェット: "株式 are the greatest 資産 class. Put 90% into an S&P 500 指数 fund. Hold 10+ years and you almost certainly win."
large_cap.when_good: During economic expansion, stable 金利s, strong corporate earnings
large_cap.when_bad: During 景気後退, rapid rate hikes, クレジット crises (2008: −50%, 2022: −25%)
large_cap.tip: Both agree on holding 株式. Maintain 40% target. バフェット would go higher, but ダリオ says 40% is right for 分散投資.

bond.title: 🏛️ 債券
bond.role: The safety net of your ポートフォリオ. Tends to rise when 株式 fall.
bond.dalio: ダリオ: "The king in 景気後退 and デフレ. The cornerstone of All Weather — 55% recommended."
bond.buffett: バフェット: "債券 are a terrible 投資 right now. When インフレ hits, 債券 投資家 face a double 損失 — taxes and purchasing power."
bond.when_good: During 景気後退, デフレ, falling 金利s (rates ↓ = bond prices ↑)
bond.when_bad: During インフレ, rapid rate spikes (2022: 債券 −17%, historically worst)
bond.tip: ダリオ wants 55%, バフェット wants to minimize. Compromise: 15% — hold only as a buffer in extreme downturns.

bitcoin.title: ₿ ビットコイン
bitcoin.role: Digital gold. Capped supply (21M) makes it an インフレ ヘッジ + high-リスク growth 資産.
bitcoin.dalio: ダリオ (2024): "It's reasonable to hold a small amount of ビットコイン. Recognizing it as a digital store of value."
bitcoin.buffett: バフェット: "Rat poison squared. It produces nothing. I wouldn't buy it for $100." — Position unchanged as of 2024.
bitcoin.when_good: Abundant liquidity, インフレ fears, institutional adoption
bitcoin.when_bad: Sharp rate hikes, regulatory crackdowns, broad 市場 パニック (high beta)
bitcoin.tip: The biggest disagreement between them. ダリオ: 1–3% vs バフェット: 0%. Practical compromise: 10% — decide based on your リスク tolerance.

altcoin.title: アルトコイン
altcoin.role: High-risk, high-reward speculative 資産. 3–5× more volatile than Bitcoin.
altcoin.dalio: ダリオ: "No direct statement. But speculative 資産 should be strictly capped at under 5% of total."
altcoin.buffett: バフェット: "I don't invest in things I don't understand. Altcoins are no different from a casino. They produce nothing."
altcoin.when_good: Bull 市場s, post-Bitcoin 上昇 altcoin seasons
altcoin.when_bad: Bear markets — drop far harder than ビットコイン (90%+ 損失 possible)
altcoin.tip: Both strongly oppose. Stick to a 5% ceiling — use only for tax-損失 harvesting when in the red.

gold.title: 金・貴金属
gold.role: 5,000 years of value storage. Rises on dollar weakness, インフレ, and geopolitical crises.
gold.dalio: ダリオ: "Every ポートフォリオ should have gold. It's the only real money that isn't printed. The ultimate ヘッジ against インフレ and 危機."
gold.buffett: バフェット: "Gold produces nothing. Just sits in a vault. For the same money you could buy all US farmland or ExxonMobil — I'd never buy gold."
gold.when_good: インフレ, weak dollar, geopolitical crises, central bank distrust (strongest in stagflation)
gold.when_bad: Strong dollar, real interest rate spikes (gold pays no 利回り — opportunity cost rises)
gold.tip: ダリオ wins this one. バフェット's 'no production' critique is valid, but 分散投資 and 危機-ヘッジ value is proven. Keep 12%.

commodity.title: コモディティ
commodity.role: 資産 that directly reflect インフレ. Includes oil, agricultural goods, and metals.
commodity.dalio: ダリオ All Weather: "Hold 7.5% in commodities. When インフレ hits, commodities protect the ポートフォリオ."
commodity.buffett: バフェット: "I don't buy commodity ETF. But I hold energy companies (Chevron, Occidental) — their earnings matter more than the commodity itself."
commodity.when_good: インフレ, supply shocks, weak dollar, geopolitical conflicts
commodity.when_bad: 景気後退 / デフレ (falling demand → commodity prices drop)
commodity.tip: バフェット prefers energy 株式 over ETF. Commodity ETF (PDBC, DJP) are the ダリオ approach — target 8%.

cash.title: 現金
cash.role: 機会のための弾薬。押し目買いの資金。短期流動性を確保します。
cash.dalio: ダリオ: "Cash is trash. Held long-term, インフレ eats away its value — keep only the minimum."
cash.buffett: バフェット: "Berkshire always keeps at least $20B in cash. The person with cash when fear is at its peak wins."
cash.when_good: Just before a 市場 暴落, waiting for 投資 opportunities, ahead of planned expenses
cash.when_bad: During インフレ (real purchasing power of cash erodes every year)
cash.tip: バフェット wins. Keep 10% as opportunity ammunition. ダリオ wants to minimize, but 10% is needed to buy during crashes.

realestate.title: 🏠 不動産
realestate.role: Illiquid long-term 資産. The foundation of your ポートフォリオ — not a リバランス target.
realestate.dalio: ダリオ: "Hard 資産 act as a buffer in financial crises. Preserves purchasing power in インフレ — but LTV management is key."
realestate.buffett: バフェット: "Real estate is a fine 投資 but not my specialty. Great company 株式 beat direct real estate. Buying a home is an excellent financial decision."
realestate.when_good: インフレ, low interest rates, population growth areas (preserves real value)
realestate.when_bad: Rapid rate hikes, population decline, クレジット crises (high LTV リスク forced sale)
realestate.tip: Both agree on owning your primary home. Exclude from liquid 資産 リバランス and manage separately. Keep LTV below 60%.

terms.title: コミュニティ Guidelines
terms.intro: Please read and agree to the following コミュニティ guidelines before participating in the baln コミュニティ.
terms.safe_community_desc: baln is committed to providing a safe and constructive environment for all users to share 投資 information.
terms.zero_tolerance_title: ゼロトレランスポリシー
terms.zero_tolerance_desc:
The following behaviors are strictly prohibited and will result in immediate content removal and アカウント suspension:

• Profanity, personal attacks, hate speech, doxxing
• Spam, advertising, flooding
• False or exaggerated 投資 information
• Illegal 取引 room operations or solicitations
• Sexual, violent, or graphic content
• Fraud, phishing, illegal financial activities
• Harassment or bullying of other users
terms.report_block_desc:
• You can レポート inappropriate content or users at any time
• Blocking a user will immediately remove all their content from your feed
• All レポートs are reviewed within 24 hours, and 認証済み violations result in content removal and sanctions
• False レポートs may result in sanctions against the レポートer
terms.moderation_title: コンテンツモデレーション
terms.moderation_desc:
• Our moderation team reviews all reported content within 24 hours
• Violating content is immediately removed and the offending user's アカウント is restricted
• Repeat offenders face permanent アカウント suspension
• You can manage your block list in 設定
terms.disclaimer: Content posted in the コミュニティ represents individual opinions and does not represent the official position of baln. Do not interpret it as 投資 advice.

baekdu.subtitle: Volcanic ash paralyzes 半導体 物流
baekdu.shareTitle: 白頭山が噴火したら私のポートフォリオはどうなる？
baekdu.chain2: 火山灰 spreads across Korean Peninsula & Japan
baekdu.chain4: 半導体 物流 paralyzed (Samsung, SK)
baekdu.chain6: Agricultural damage → 食品 prices surge
baekdu.histRecovery: Half 6ヶ月で回復, full recovery in 2 years
baekdu.histLesson: 自然災害s are frightening but not permanent. Once alternative 物流 routes are secured, 半導体s can actually benefit from substitution effects.
baekdu.action1: 分散投資する if heavily invested in airlines/travel
baekdu.action2: 半導体は初期下落後に反発する可能性があります
baekdu.action3: Holding 10-15% in USD/金 acts as insurance
baekdu.action4: 災害復旧・建設株は復興需要から恩恵を受けます
baekdu.aiPrompt: 白頭山大規模噴火シナリオ：VEI 6-7の爆発、火山灰が朝鮮半島と日本を覆う。空港閉鎖、半導体物流麻痺、大規模保険請求、農業被害。各ポートフォリオ保有銘柄への影響を分析してください。

nkInvasion.histEvent: Yeonpyeong Shelling (2010) + North Korea 原子力 Crisis (2017)
nkInvasion.histRecovery: 3営業日で回復→1ヶ月以内に過去最高値
nkInvasion.histLesson: Korean Peninsula 地政学 crises have historically been buying opportunities. HowEVer, full-scale war is a different dimension — holding 30% in cash + USD + 金 is essential 保険.
nkInvasion.action1: 韓国株100%集中は極端なリスクです
nkInvasion.action2: Hold 30%+ in USD, 金, and US treasuries as insurance
nkInvasion.action3: 防衛株 clearly benefit during crises
